title: The purposes of market research
summary: 9609 AS — why firms research markets before decisions.
learningObjectives: Evaluate cost vs risk of not researching.

simpleExplanation.title: Reduce guesswork
simpleExplanation.summary: Market research collects data about customers and competitors to lower the risk of product and pricing mistakes.

sections.content: **Market research purposes** (3.2.1) opens **Topic 3.2**. Tie each purpose to a **decision** (product, price, promotion, place).
